name: Thunder Seal
description: At the end of the User's Turn they are inflicted with the Paralyzed Status Condition, this ignores Type Immunities. If they lose this item, the Paralyzed Status Condition fades. As long as they are holding this item, they gain +1 Base Defense or Special Defense chosen at the time the Paralysis is inflicted, in addition they cannot be Fully Paralyzed.
